title: rubus × hallandicus
intro: Rubus × hallandicus, a hybrid of the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis), is a type of bramble that is native to Sweden and Denmark. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × hallandicus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
